form.formComment: He is resuming after a five-and-a-half months break. Finished off last campaign third of 8 at Dubbo Cl1 November 1 over 1200m, 1.2 len behind Brutal Love carrying 56.5kg at $2. On debut second of 10 at Dubbo Ctry Mdn-Sw September 28 over 1000m, a nose behind Jagerschnitzel with 59kg at $2.40. Talented gelding who returns with the one trial placing.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after almost two and a half years got back early 4th of 8 at Muswellbrook Cg&E Cl1 on April 6 over 1000m, on a slow track; 4 len behind Northern Boogie with 57.5kg at $31. Previously second-up 7th of 10 at Sunshine Coast Cl1-Sw on November 26 2023 over 1000m, slow going 7 len behind The Fixer carrying 60kg at $26. That run was a bit plain so prefer him later on.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Third-up today. First-up 6th of 8 at Goulburn Ctry Cl1 on March 10 over 1200m, slow going 6 len behind Cruizingthestars carrying 59kg at $3.70. Second run from a spell sat on the speed and boxed on steadily 6th of 11 at Wagga Ctry Bm58 on March 29 over 1200m, slow going 2.5 len behind La Mer Bleue carrying 58.5kg at $6. Promising galloper. Fitter now and well placed coming back in distance.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Form hard to fault. Most recently 3rd in a small field at Sapphire Coast Cl1 on March 30 over 1000m, slow going 2 len behind Harry The Thief carrying 56.5kg at $7. The run before that won by 0.5 len at Canberra Fedral Mdn March 8 over 1000m on a rain affected track defeating Stormy Reign with 56kg at $21. Expected to go well again.

form.formComment: Resumes after a break of four-and-a-half months and has been in the money when fresh before. Finished off last preparation fifth of 12 at Narromine Cl1 December 2 over 1200m, 2.75 len behind Romantic Love carrying 55kg at $3.80. Previously first up; third of 10 at Dubbo Ctry Mdn-Sw September 28 over 1000m, a neck behind Jagerschnitzel carrying 55kg at $5.50. Looks forward enough after a recent trial win. Nice filly resuming with the good trial win, go close.
